name: Ted Nugent

acts.description: Self-described relationships with underage girls in the 1970s; became legal guardian of 17-year-old girlfriend Pele Massa
Decades of racist, sexist public statements and threats against political figures

behavior_summary: Boasted about relationships with underage girls in the 1970s, including becoming the legal guardian of 17-year-old Pele Massa to circumvent consent laws. Decades of racist, misogynist public statements.

art.summary: Hard rock guitarist with a handful of genuine classic rock staples. Better remembered now for political extremism than music.

verdict.blurb: Bragged publicly about having sex with underage girls and used legal guardianship as a workaround for statutory rape laws. Cat Scratch Fever will never sound the same once you know what the cat scratch was.
